name: =?utf-8?Q?M=C5=A9thoni_Wambu_Kraal=2C_EMILY=27s_List?=
subject: Nominate a fighter from Virginia
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c73f3/24c69fd9/f7939c3e/18e13a08/2030496001/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENE223N_digital_email_20170222_RisingStarNoms_n-all&source=WQENE223N_digital_email_20170222_RisingStarNoms_n-all")
---

Peter,

Women elected to school boards, city councils, mayors' offices, countywide offices, and state legislatures are on the front lines fighting for women and families.

With Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in control of many state legislatures, this work could not be more important.

Every year EMILY's List recognizes a woman currently serving in state or local office with the Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award. We want to award a leader who is doing incredible work in her community and who has a promising career in public service ahead of her.

**[So we want to hear from you about the women leaders in your community. Nominate a woman who is fighting for women and families in your community for the Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c73f3/24c69fd9/f7939c3e/18e13a09/2030496001/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170222_email_RisingStarNoms?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+So+we+want+to+hear+from+you+about+the+wo&utm_campaign=WQENE223N_digital_email_20170222_RisingStarNoms_n-all&source=WQENE223N_digital_email_20170222_RisingStarNoms_n-all")**

The recipient of this year's Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award will not only be honored at our annual EMILY's List event this spring, but will also know that we appreciate her work and hope to support her in whatever she does next in her career.

Past recipients have included Georgia House Minority Leader Stacey Abrams, Boston City Councillor Ayanna Pressley, and Speaker of the Colorado House Crisanta Duran. These women are incredible fighters in their communities -- and their work just got a lot harder with a White House hostile to the things we care about.

We want to find the next Rising Star. We know there's no shortage of local elected women fighting the good fight. But we need your help finding them so we can lift them up.

**Nominate a pro-choice Democratic woman serving in public office for this year's Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Nominate-Rising-Star](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c73f3/24c69fd9/f7939c3e/18e13a0a/2030496001/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170222_email_RisingStarNoms?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgNominateRisingSt&utm_campaign=WQENE223N_digital_email_20170222_RisingStarNoms_n-all&source=WQENE223N_digital_email_20170222_RisingStarNoms_n-all") **

Thank you for uplifting women leaders,

Mũthoni Wambu Kraal
Senior Director of State Engagement and Development, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c73f3/24c69fd9/f7939c3e/18e13a0b/2030496001/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQENE223N_digital_email_20170222_RisingStarNoms_n-all&source=WQENE223N_digital_email_20170222_RisingStarNoms_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c73f3/24c69fd9/f7939c3e/18e13a04/2030496001/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQENE223N_digital_email_20170222_RisingStarNoms_n-all&source=WQENE223N_digital_email_20170222_RisingStarNoms_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c73f3/24c69fd9/f7939c3e/18e13a05/2030496001/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQENE223N_digital_email_20170222_RisingStarNoms_n-all&source=WQENE223N_digital_email_20170222_RisingStarNoms_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c73f3/24c69fd9/f7939c3e/18e13a06/2030496001/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQENE223N_digital_email_20170222_RisingStarNoms_n-all&source=WQENE223N_digital_email_20170222_RisingStarNoms_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

body:

Friend, Liberals in the media, Hollywood, and the Democrat establishment have been leading the fight to destroy our movement. Which is why I’m asking you to activate your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year. With you by our side as an active member, NOTHING will stop our movement to Make America Great Again! Please contribute $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $10 to activate your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year. That was because of you. Now please step up for the 2017 year as a Sustaining Member by making a contribution of $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $10. Thank you, Donald J. name: Anne Holton
subject: Sign Tim's birthday card?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

Tim's birthday is coming up on Sunday. I'm working with his team to surprise him with a card signed by all of his supporters.

**[Will you add your name? You can even write him a personal message.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=FlsC6qqddv2BRiD7%2F%2FTWO41MCNkUY4A%2F)**

I know it would mean a great deal to him if you signed his card.

Thanks for helping to make his 59th birthday a great one.

Anne

name: Glenn Davis
subject: A Real Life Captain America
body:
Peter,
While Captain America may have been a fictional WWII
patriotic super-soldier, there was a real life patriotic
super-soldier born here in Virginia.

This past Tuesday, I had the distinct honor to preside
over a center-aisle presentation on the floor of the House of
Delegates for such a man, Col. Edward Shames, and present him
with House Joint Resolution 824.

As a member of the 101st Airborne in WWII, Col. Shames'
first jump was into Normandy, France on D-Day, June 6, 1944. He
later fought in the Battle of the Bulge, was part of the
liberation of Dachau, and walked through Eagle's Nest, Hitler's
mountain retreat, where he took a unique souvenir.

It's the sacrifice of Americans such as Col. Shames and
their dedication to our nation that has protected the liberties
and freedoms that we enjoy today.

Watch below the video of the center-aisle presentation. I
hope you enjoy the story of a real life Captain America, Col.
Edward Shames.

Thank you for your time,

Delegate Glenn Davis

Authorized by DAVIS for LG

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 17, 2017.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.vervemail.com/p/iJD3Ul5mN7

name: Democrats.org
subject: Add your name if you're not a paid protestor
body:
We have to protect the Affordable Care Act.
---
**Make sure Republicans know they can't hide from their constituents. Add your name to tell the GOP to protect affordable health care, not repeal it:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Health-Care-AB?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170223_ew_nd&source=em_20170223_ew_nd")**
Friend --

Yesterday, at Sen. Tom Cotton's town hall in Bentonville, Arkansas, one of Cotton's constituents asked anyone in the crowd who was affected by the Affordable Care Act to stand up.

Here's what happened:

[](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Health-Care-AB?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20170223_ew_nd&source=em_20170223_ew_nd")
**[The GOP's plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act will affect us all. We have to do everything we can to protect our health care.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Health-Care-AB?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+The+GOPs+plan+to+repeal+the+Affordable+C&utm_campaign=em_20170223_ew_nd&source=em_20170223_ew_nd")**

Scenes like this one are happening all across the country, but Trump and some Republican members of Congress are trying to dismiss them as the work of paid protestors.

That's just absurd.

Another woman came to Cotton's town hall to ask what he'd do to help her husband, who currently only pays $29 a month for health insurance under the ACA. She told him that she lives just down the road from his district office. She wasn't a paid protestor.

The man who showed up at Sen. Chuck Grassley's town hall in Iowa Falls and explained how he wouldn't be able to afford insurance at all if it wasn't for Obamacare wasn't a paid protestor.

One woman in Lawrenceburg, Kentucky told Sen. Mitch McConnell that if he could answer her questions about how unemployed coal miners and veterans would be able to afford health care, she'd "sit down and shut up like Elizabeth Warren." She wasn't a paid protestor.

Republicans know that the more they talk about their plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act, the more popular the ACA gets. They'd rather dismiss their constituents or even cancel town hall meetings altogether than look them in the eye and admit that they've spent the last seven years trying to take health care away from millions of Americans.

**[Let's make sure they know there's nowhere to hide. Click here and join the 308,961 grassroots Democrats who have called on Congress to protect the Affordable Care Act.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Health-Care-AB?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+Lets+make+sure+they+know+theres+nowhere+&utm_campaign=em_20170223_ew_nd&source=em_20170223_ew_nd") Even if your Republican representatives aren't holding town halls (or if you're fortunate enough to be represented in Congress by Democrats who will fight for your health care), you can still make your voice heard:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Health-Care-AB?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170223_ew_nd&source=em_20170223_ew_nd")**
Thanks,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c57d/4067b0a/2c8072e39/7e7d015d/137460863/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170223_ew_nd&source=em_20170223_ew_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c57d/4067b0a/2c8072e39/7e7d015a/137460863/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170223_ew_nd&source=em_20170223_ew_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c57d/4067b0a/2c8072e39/7e7d015b/137460863/VEsO/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170223_ew_nd&source=em_20170223_ew_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c57d/4067b0a/2c8072e39/7e7d0158/137460863/VEsP/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170223_ew_nd&source=em_20170223_ew_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Let's invest in our future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
This is a major, multi-year investment in our teachers -- it puts our money where our trust is.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202980/2fde7c66/4385a41b/15691320/3326842386/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170223-cooper-donate?utm_campaign=em17_170223_teach_engg_gq_ful_rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170223_teach_engg_gq_ful_rc")
---
Friends, For too long, North Carolina teachers have felt disrespected by our leaders in Raleigh. I promised that would change when I became governor. This week I announced my teacher pay plan, which aims to put more money in the pockets of our teachers. This is a major, multi-year investment in our teachers -- it puts our money where our trust is. Here's my plan: We raise average teacher pay five percent this year, and another five percent next year -- all without raising taxes. That pace would make us best in the Southeast in three years, and in five years North Carolina teachers would be at the national average. I'm also proposing an annual teacher supply bonus to help cover the cost of school supplies for our teachers. Education is part of North Carolina's legacy -- it's who we are as Tar Heels. If we can come together and put this plan into action, we can reclaim that legacy. Thanks for all you continue to do for North Carolina, Roy | | [**Donate ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202980/2fde7c66/4385a41b/15691320/3326842386/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170223-cooper-donate?utm_campaign=em17_170223_teach_engg_gq_ful_rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170223_teach_engg_gq_ful_rc")
---

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 1190
Raleigh NC 27602 United States

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe, go to:
[http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202980/2fde7c66/4385a41b/15691323/3326842386/VEsF/ "http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe")

body:
Time to activate your membership for 2017. |

Friend, Have you activated your Sustaining Membership for 2017 yet? President Trump reached out this morning and has asked to review our list of 2017 supporters to know exactly who’s with him in our fight against the liberal agenda and the fake news. Time is running out, Friend, and the cutoff to get your name on the membership list is MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. Please contribute $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $10 to activate your membership and put your name at the top of the list that will be sent to the President. Thank you, Trump Headquarters ---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Thu, Feb 23, 2017 at 2:32 PM Subject: Come on board To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Liberals in the media, Hollywood, and the Democrat establishment have been leading the fight to destroy our movement. Which is why I’m asking you to activate your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year. With you by our side as an active member, NOTHING will stop our movement to Make America Great Again! Please contribute $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $10 to activate your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year. We won the election because the American people refused to let the talking heads in the media and Hollywood speak for us. We unleashed a movement unlike anything the world had ever seen. That was because of you. Now please step up for the 2017 year as a Sustaining Member by making a contribution of $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $10. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States

ACTIVATE YOUR MEMBERSHIP

name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: Horrifying anti-choice laws >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c73e0/24c69fd9/f7a6650b/18e12c75/3409731961/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE225N_digital_email_20170223_Arkansas_n-all&source=WQEFE225N_digital_email_20170223_Arkansas_n-all")
---

Peter,

You should know about what's happening in Arkansas.

Emboldened by Donald Trump's anti-choice agenda, Republicans in the Arkansas State Legislature have been on the warpath taking away women's reproductive rights.

Just a week after the inauguration, they banned one of the safest and most common abortion procedures -- AND the law allows **family members to sue abortion providers to stop it.** The law is so loosely worded that rapists may even be able to sue the doctors of survivors.

This is absolutely unacceptable. And the only way we're going to stop this is to elect more pro-choice Democratic women who will fight this kind of unconstitutional legislation.

**[Donate $3 today to recruit, train, and elect women in Arkansas and state legislatures across the country who will stop horrifying anti-choice laws like this.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c73e0/24c69fd9/f7a6650b/18e12c76/3409731961/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170223_email_Arkansas?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+today+to+recruit+train+and+elec&utm_campaign=WQEFE225N_digital_email_20170223_Arkansas_n-all&source=WQEFE225N_digital_email_20170223_Arkansas_n-all")**

Right now, women make up only 19 percent of the Arkansas State Legislature. There is no way this kind of dangerous anti-choice legislation would move forward if there were more women there to hold them accountable.

At EMILY's List, our goal is to elect pro-choice Democratic women from Arkansas to Alaska and from Maine to Hawai'i -- because a woman's right to a safe, legal abortion shouldn't matter based on her zip code.

With the GOP ramping up anti-choice attacks, we have to fight harder than ever to elect the champions who will stop them.

**Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women who will stand up for reproductive rights:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Arkansas-Law](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c73e0/24c69fd9/f7a6650b/18e12c77/3409731961/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170223_email_Arkansas?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgArkansasLaw&utm_campaign=WQEFE225N_digital_email_20170223_Arkansas_n-all&source=WQEFE225N_digital_email_20170223_Arkansas_n-all")**

Thanks,

Kate Black
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c73e0/24c69fd9/f7a6650b/18e12c70/3409731961/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170223_email_Arkansas?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE225N_digital_email_20170223_Arkansas_n-all&source=WQEFE225N_digital_email_20170223_Arkansas_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c73e0/24c69fd9/f7a6650b/18e12c71/3409731961/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE225N_digital_email_20170223_Arkansas_n-all&source=WQEFE225N_digital_email_20170223_Arkansas_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c73e0/24c69fd9/f7a6650b/18e12c72/3409731961/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE225N_digital_email_20170223_Arkansas_n-all&source=WQEFE225N_digital_email_20170223_Arkansas_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c73e0/24c69fd9/f7a6650b/18e12c73/3409731961/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE225N_digital_email_20170223_Arkansas_n-all&source=WQEFE225N_digital_email_20170223_Arkansas_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.
clean_body: We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | "" Peter, You should know about what's happening in Arkansas. Emboldened by Donald Trump's anti-choice agenda, Republicans in the Arkansas State Legislature have been on the warpath taking away women's reproductive rights. Just a week after the inauguration, they banned one of the safest and most common abortion procedures -- AND the law allows family members to sue abortion providers to stop it. The law is so loosely worded that rapists may even be able to sue the doctors of survivors. This is absolutely unacceptable. And the only way we're going to stop this is to elect more pro-choice Democratic women who will fight this kind of unconstitutional legislation. "" Right now, women make up only 19 percent of the Arkansas State Legislature. There is no way this kind of dangerous anti-choice legislation would move forward if there were more women there to hold them accountable. At EMILY's List, our goal is to elect pro-choice Democratic women from Arkansas to Alaska and from Maine to Hawai'i -- because a woman's right to a safe, legal abortion shouldn't matter based on her zip code. With the GOP ramping up anti-choice attacks, we have to fight harder than ever to elect the champions who will stop them. Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women who will stand up for reproductive rights: "" Thanks, Kate Black Vice President of Research, EMILY's List "" | EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office. | Paid for by EMILY's List "" and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email "". We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe "". Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: JUST IN (via DSCC)
subject: "Republican lawmakers fret" (Washington Post)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
In a leaked recording, GOP leaders are worried how strongly Democrats will respond to repealing the Affordable Care Act. Let's prove how right they are... In a leaked recording, GOP leaders are worried how strongly Democrats will respond to repealing the Affordable Care Act. Let's prove how right they are...
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170223-JustInDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend --

Republicans are terrified about repealing the Affordable Care Act.

Yes, they've talked a big game about how they'd repeal Obamacare in a heartbeat if given the chance. But in a recording leaked to _The Washington Post_ , GOP leaders are panicking about how grassroots supporters will respond:

>
> _" Health insurance is going to be tough enough for us to deal with without having millions of people on social media come to Planned Parenthood's defense and sending hundreds of thousands of new donors to the Democratic Senate and Democratic congressional campaign committees. **So I would just urge us to rethink this. "**_

The Republicans have heard your voices - at rallies, town halls, and yes, on social media. Now is our chance to prove to them that there are consequences for trying to force 32 million people off their health care.

**[Chip in $1 to show Republicans you're in this fight with the DSCC to protect health care for all.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170223-JustInDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

The fact that ripping away health coverage would make life worse for millions of Americans should be enough to give Republicans pause on ACA repeal.

But it's not. Instead, they're worried about how _" we'll be judged in the election less than two years away."_

**But here 's what they can't ignore, friend, and what they fear:** how many Democrats will step up right now with the DSCC to protect the Affordable Care Act and keep Planned Parenthood's doors open.

**Send a message to Republicans loud and clear. Donate $1 right now:**

**[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170223-JustInDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thanks for everything you do,
Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e352/2b07114c/45e57ac0/736ae5f7/141472377/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e352/2b07114c/45e57ac0/736ae5f6/141472377/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e352/2b07114c/45e57ac0/736ae5f1/141472377/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: =?utf-8?Q?Eric=20Greitens?=
subject: United.
body:
Peter,
Yesterday, we had the honor of welcoming the Vice President of the United States--and my friend--Mike Pence to our state. I'm so proud of what we were able to show him.
First, we visited a 100-year old Missouri business. We met with workers and job creators to show the strength and quality of Missouri's workforce. We showed Vice President Pence that America's economic comeback is starting right here in Missouri.
On Tuesday, I went to Facebook to ask volunteers to join us in helping to clean up the Jewish cemetery that had been vandalized and desecrated this past weekend. I spoke on the phone with several faith leaders from the Jewish, Muslim, and Christian communities. I asked them to bring their friends and neighbors to help us.
The response blew us away.
Hundreds of Missourians, of every creed and from every corner of the state, came together to stand up for our neighbors. When we put out the call, the people of Missouri stepped up and demonstrated to the country and the world that we will fight for our neighbors. Donations poured in, and tens of thousands of dollars were raised for the repairs at the cemetery.
I told the Vice President what we were planning to do. As soon as I told him, he decided to change his plans and join us. He wanted us to know that he, and the White House, believe in what we are doing in Missouri. He wanted to send a message about how we can meet cowardice with courage and hate with productive action and shared service.
Too many politicians have sharp tongues and soft hands. They're willing to talk about problems, but that's often as far as it goes. Vice President Pence joined us and got to work in our response to violence, by personally helping us to clean up the affected headstones and rebuild the beauty of a sacred site attacked with hate.
President Trump called me and asked me to let you all know how proud he is of our state. Vice President Pence expressed his admiration for our workers and the crowds that came to clean with us. For too long the world has known Missouri for our embarrassments, failures, and scandals. We showed the world our energy, faith, and strength. I could not be more proud to be a Missourian and to be your Governor today.
\- Eric
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on [Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=6dd9f20859&e=84041254e6) and [Twitter](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=1d275ee2ee&e=84041254e6). Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=a7822dc973), but please let us know how we can improve.
